name: Block Secrets in Shell Commands
description: Checks shell commands (git add, git commit, git push) to ensure no sensitive files are being staged or committed to the public repo.

then.prompt: SECURITY CHECK: Before running this shell command, verify: 1) No .env files are being staged (git add .env) 2) No firebase config files with real API keys are being committed 3) No service account JSON files are included 4) No keystore or signing files are being pushed 5) If this is a 'git add .' command, confirm that .gitignore properly excludes all sensitive files. If any risk is detected, STOP and warn the user.
